data.title: Dari  BrideKekasih Kontrak hingga Pengantin Miliarder
data.introduce: Ketika mantan pacar saya memilih seorang gadis kaya, saya menikahi kakaknya.

data.title: Love Full of Dangers
data.introduce: Trapped by her family, Reyna was sentenced to jail for murdering her fiance's younger sister and tortured a lot inside. After being discharged, she swore to let all of them pay the price…

data.title: My Husband Loves My Robot Copy
data.introduce:
I died on the day Samuel Martinez's first love returned to the country.
My soul was trapped in a robot that looked exactly like me.
He spent every day with his first love.
For two years, he hadn't noticed anything unusual about me.
One day, he realized that the "me" who took care of him with devotion couldn't cry or laugh.
Even when his first love pushed me out to take a knife for her, I didn't die.
That's when he realized the one by his side was a robot.
When the robot was destroyed, Samuel lost his mind and filled a house with copies of "me".

data.title: Love, Betrayal, and A New Beginning
data.introduce:
In the hospital ward, Chuck, who had been in a car accident, stared at me with bloodshot eyes and growled in a low voice, "Why? Why do you want a divorce?"
I smiled.
Feigning amnesia? Weren't you the one who first suggested breaking up?

data.title: Belated Love
data.introduce:
Frederick Fuller and I had dated for five years.
The seventh time he left me to walk home alone in 104°F heat because of another woman, I couldn't help but ask him, "Frederick, my stomach really hurts. Can you come back and stay with me?"
But he said, "Keep your voice down, I just got Claire to sleep!"

data.title: When Love Slips Away
data.introduce:
The day Iris returned to the country coincided with my engagement party to Quentin Chase.
Everyone was betting on whether the Chase family's young master would run off in the middle of the night for Iris.
So I beat him to it by canceling the engagement party and boarding a plane to Westborough.
When I returned to Capitalwale, Quentin grabbed my wrist with tear-reddened eyes. "Leah, why did you leave without saying goodbye?"
Frederick Compton, who had his arm around my waist, leaned in close and announced loudly, "Because I'm young and good in bed. Leah prefers me."

data.title: After 99 days, I Found My True Love
data.introduce:
Alexander and I had an agreement: if I brought him breakfast for 100 days straight, he'd agree to date me.
But on the 99th day, I stopped. I spent 99 days chasing him, and on the final day, I used alcohol to numb the pain. Drunk, I sent my best friend a voice message: "Tell... your... brother... to... come... spend the night with me!" That night, her brother, Ethan, rang my doorbell with his ears tinged red. "How did you know I liked you? Isn't asking me to spend the night on our first day of dating a bit... too much?"
I was speechless.

data.title: Never Too Late For True Love
data.introduce:
It was the moment for thanking parents at my daughter Lila Huxley's wedding.
Just as the ceremony was flowing smoothly, my husband, Desmond Huxley, suddenly interrupted, asking everyone to hold on a minute.
He stepped up to his first love, Sabrina Duvall, and said, "Sabrina, I promised you I'd let everyone know you're my daughter's biological mother. So, how about coming up on stage and hearing her call you Mom?"
Tears welled up in Sabrina's eyes as she nodded, gripping Desmond's hand tightly as they made their way to the stage.
The two of them, silver-haired and looking as if they were still in love, held each other's hands like a couple fresh in romance.
Lila then threw herself into Sabrina's arms, repeatedly calling out with her cries echoing in the hall.
Sabrina held her close, then turned to me and said, "Selene, thank you for taking care of my daughter all these years. Even though we've finally met, I hope you'll keep looking after her and Desmond."
The guests around us were watching with a mix of pity and curiosity, their eyes filled with sympathy.
Everyone was just waiting to see me humiliated.
But instead of crumbling, I smiled at Sabrina. "What's the point of me stepping in? Here, take them both! Go ahead and enjoy your family."
